key: listening19_event_welcome
text: Hi everyone, and welcome to our morning meetup. It is so nice to see new faces here today. Before we start, let me give you a small tip. When you meet someone new, just smile and say hello. Then ask a simple question. You can ask where they are from, or what they do. You can also talk about the weather or the weekend. Do not worry about big words. Small talk is easy. Just be friendly, listen, and ask one more question. Now, please turn to the person next to you and say hello.

key: listening19_new_friend
text: Hi, I do not think we have met. My name is Sophie. It is really nice to meet you. I am here for the first time too. I am from Canada, but I live in this city now. I work as a nurse at the hospital. In my free time, I love to read and go for long walks. How about you? Where are you from, and what do you do? Oh, and the weather is so nice today, perfect for the weekend.

key: Hi, I do not think we have met. I am Elaine.

key: [order-l19]
text: Elaine sees a new person at the event. She smiles and says hello. She introduces herself and shakes hands. She asks where the person is from and what they do. She says it was great talking and says goodbye.
